creator: edwin@mavetju.org
text:
The devel/gettext port upgrade is a shared library version bump.
Therefor all run-dependent ports need a revision bump.

Fix: 

See http://www.mavetju.org/~edwin/patch-gettext.txt

It's 2.4Mb and affects 5007 ports.

If portmgr approves I will commit it per category.
